sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date, event_time DateTime, event_time_str String);
SELECT subtractSeconds(event_date, 3600) AS one_hour_before FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = subtractSeconds(event_time, 1800) WHERE event_date = toDate('2024-01-01');
SELECT subtractSeconds(event_time_str, 7200) AS two_hours_before FROM test_dates;
